label: base-character
prompt: Kevin, a trendy, expressive 19-year-old East Asian man, a Gen Z TikTok native who loves aesthetic tech. Stylish dark hair, clear youthful skin with natural texture, bright curious eyes, a playful confident expression. Wearing a plain solid-colour casual top, no logos or graphics. Hyper-realistic photograph with super-detailed true-to-life skin texture: visible pores, fine lines, subtle natural blemishes and freckles, slight uneven skin tone and natural imperfections, not airbrushed and not too perfect. Natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up portrait.
